tools.name: list_jurisdictions
tools.description: List every supported country/jurisdiction (code, name, currency, default language) plus the available languages and tones. Call this first to pick a valid jurisdiction + language.

tools.name: preview_demand_letter
tools.description: Render the demand letter's text content (title, subject, body paragraphs, amount line, legal reference, closing) as structured JSON, without producing a PDF. Use to review or refine wording before generating.

tools.name: generate_demand_letter
tools.description: Generate the finished demand-letter PDF (formal letter + matching envelope), localized and legally formatted for the jurisdiction. Returns the PDF as a base64 resource. Free, no registration.
